commit_scope: Make every home-page-reachable internal route and developer asset participate in attributed editable content and attention credit flow.

commands: cd web && npx vitest run tests/attribution-target.test.ts
cd web && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false --incremental false
local_validation.summary: All targeted API and web tests passed, the production web build passed, the worktree-local API/web contract passed after repairing stale route-copy assertions, and npm registry checks showed the CLI and MCP package latest tags match the local package versions.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.details: Pending merge to main, public API/web deploy validation, and final npm no-op/publish decision based on package diff.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; remote CI, merge, and public deploy proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: 36 home-page links were audited with one sub-agent per live link, including internal pages, ideas, concepts, API docs, GitHub, npm CLI, npm MCP, and ClawHub.
Internal Link usage from the home page and global navigation now routes through AttributedInternalLink, which pings /api/views/ping with a route-derived attribution target.

RouteReadPing records page reads globally and deduplicates click-then-route credit; RouteEditablePageContent adds API/CLI-editable markdown to page routes that do not already own an editable content block.
Idea detail responses now expose content_markdown and the idea page renders canonical attributed idea content from the entity-view API.
The CLI content surface was verified from npm latest via `coh content set <entity_type> <entity_id> --lang <lang> --file <path> [--by <contributor_id>]`.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Home-page-reachable content can be edited through the entity-view API/CLI with source attribution, then reads and link clicks credit attention back to the source contribution.
test_flows: API attribution matrix for all home-page link targets
